analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$78,200 on Apr 24 afternoon. Ranging $77,500-$78,500 since midnight UTC. Volatility cooling, derivatives momentum fading.
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 46 (Fear zone, cautious sentiment persisting)
BTC price range today: $77,500-$78,500 — tight compression, volatility cooled
Derivatives: negative funding rates signal many traders remain net-short/cautious
Spot BTC ETF: 5 consecutive days of inflows; $245M by mid-April; AUM growing
Strategy (Saylor) bought 34,164 BTC ($2.54B) on Apr 20 — largest acquisition since late 2024
Goldman Sachs filed for new Bitcoin ETF (regulatory tailwinds long-term bullish)
Morgan Stanley filed for spot Bitcoin ETF in Jan 2026
Altcoin season index: 39/100 — BTC dominance preferred over altcoins
KelpDAO $292M exploit hurt DeFi TVL (-$14B to 1-year low) — altcoin sentiment fragile
CPI Mar 2026: 3.3% YoY (up from 2.4% Feb) — elevated inflation, no rate cuts expected
CME monthly BTC+ETH options expiry today (Apr 24) — volatility risk event
Bitcoin Core v31.0 upgrade (Apr 2026) — redesigned mempool, Tor/I2P privacy
analysis.macro_backdrop: Fed funds 3.50-3.75% (on hold). FOMC Apr 28-29 — 99.4% probability of hold (no cut/hike). CPI 3.3% limits dovish pivot. GDP Q1 advance + PCE due Apr 30. Geopolitical: Iran ceasefire extended (Trump), Hormuz risk reduced. Big Tech earnings (MSFT/Apple) clustered Apr 29-30 as risk sentiment driver.
analysis.technical_note: BTC $78,200 — consolidating below $80K resistance. Tight range since midnight UTC suggests imminent volatility expansion (could be either direction). CME options expiry at 16:00 UTC today is the primary near-term catalyst. Confidence 0.45 — just below 0.50 bot threshold — macro filter INACTIVE this cycle.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral: Institutional demand (ETF inflows, Saylor mega-buy, Goldman/Morgan Stanley filings) offset by Fear & Greed 46, negative funding rates, CPI 3.3% (no dovish pivot), CME expiry volatility risk today, and FOMC uncertainty Apr 28-29. BTC trading in narrow range — no clear directional conviction.
